about_mission => string (151) "To provide high-quality, sustainable furniture that enriches living spaces w...
$value['about_mission']
To provide high-quality, sustainable furniture that enriches living spaces while preserving Indonesian cultural heritage and empowering local artisans.
about_story => string (239) "PT Chakra Naga Furniture was founded in 2005 in Jepara, the heart of Indones...
$value['about_story']
PT Chakra Naga Furniture was founded in 2005 in Jepara, the heart of Indonesian furniture craftsmanship. We combine traditional wood carving techniques with modern design to create high-quality furniture that meets international standards.
